userGroups.dailyValueTargetGroupName: Adults and children 4 or more years of age
userGroups.langualCodeDescription: Adults and Children 4 years and above

activeIngredients.name: Vitamin B12
activeIngredients.notes: Vitamin B-12 (Form: as Cyanocobalamin) Note: 5 mg

statements.notes: Promotes Energy Metabolism and Nervous System Health*

VEGETARIAN VEGAN FORMULA
GUARANTEED QUALITY
LABORATORY TESTED
No Gluten, No Yeast, No Milk or Milk Derivatives, No Lactose, No Soy, No Egg, No Grapefruit, No Fish, No Sugar, No Preservatives, No Artificial Flavor, No Sodium.
Directions: For adults, take one (1) microlozenge daily. Place microlozenge under tongue for 30 seconds before swallowing.
Vitamin B-12 is essential for the normal formation of blood cells and contributes to the health of the nervous system.* In addition, the B vitamins play a role in energy metabolism in the body.*

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: WARNING: If you are pregnant, nursing or taking any medications, consult your doctor before use.
Discontinue use and consult your doctor if any adverse reactions occur.
Keep out of reach of children.
Store in a cool, dry place.
Do not use if seal under cap is broken or missing.
*These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
